approvedBy: Steve full steam ahead instruction + Codex senior-engineer Foundation session
notes: Approved as a bounded no-auth Foundation DB monolith split. Scope: extract only the Strategy Operating Truth finance/Owners/FUB/KPI source-card builder from lib/foundation-db.js into lib/foundation-strategy-operating-truth.js, preserve Google source IDs/ranges/labels/source-card shape and public getStrategyOperatingTruthSnapshot callers, pass live dependencies to avoid circular imports, and dogfood that old inline builder ownership fails. Not approved: broad DB rewrite, schema changes, seed changes, BHAG/Agent Engine snapshot changes, source crawl/job/intelligence/shared-comms/hub changes, Marketing Video Lab wiring, paid-source auth, Meeting Vault Phase B, Drive permission mutation, or request-access emails.
